identity.title: UVLO Brownout Detector
identity.supported_scope: pure voltage-domain event-driven transient behavioral Verilog-A

parameters.name: tr
parameters.override_behavior: sets out and metric transition smoothing

parameters.name: vth
parameters.override_behavior: sets clk and rst voltage-coded logic threshold

properties.observable_contract: Active reset clears the power-good out signal and drives metric to the public fault code 0.9 V.
On a sampled update, vin strictly greater than 0.65 V asserts power-good out.
For sampled vin values from 0.55 V through 0.65 V inclusive, out preserves its previous power-good state.
On a sampled update, vin strictly less than 0.55 V clears out to the brownout state.
Metric is the checker-observable status code: 0.1 V when out is power-good high and 0.9 V when reset, undervoltage, or brownout is active.

modeling_constraints: Use deterministic sampled voltage-domain hysteresis state.
Do not use current contributions, transistor-level devices, AC/noise analysis, or KCL/KVL regulation loops.
Do not add validation-only state, ports, or simulator-specific side channels.
